title: Simplicity
description: As simple as it can be.
body:
As simple as it can get.

Very simply, it’s simple.

This texture pack doesn't have many details, however, still succeds in maintaining the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

This texture pack has much less details so it can reduce lag and make your Minecraft viewing experience better and simpler overall.

IMPORTANT INFO:

This is in Alpha right now, we don't know how this will affect your game at this moment in time.
We're developing this, and as time goes on, it will be more finished and more finished, until the first big release will be released and the pack will be finished.
